parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: When set to 1 the captures the image stream from the camera.

parameters.name: inputsource
parameters.label: Input Source
parameters.description: Select which input type to use between USB, recorded SVO file, or network streaming

parameters.name: camera
parameters.label: Camera
parameters.description: Selects which ZED camera to use.

parameters.name: file
parameters.label: File
parameters.description: The path and name of the recorded SVO file to load. SVO and SVO2 playback is supported.

parameters.name: streamip
parameters.label: Stream IP
parameters.description: The IP address of the streaming camera.

parameters.name: streamport
parameters.label: Stream Port
parameters.description: The port of the streaming camera.

parameters.name: initialize
parameters.label: Initialize
parameters.description: (pulse) Initializes the SVO playback: sets the SVO position to zero.

parameters.name: start
parameters.label: Start
parameters.description: (pulse) Start is the signal to commence the SVO playback.

parameters.name: play
parameters.label: Play
parameters.description: SVO plays when 1, SVO stops when 0.

parameters.name: cue
parameters.label: Cue
parameters.description: Jumps to Cue Point when set to 1.

parameters.name: cuepoint
parameters.label: Cue Point
parameters.description: Set the SVO position in the SVO playback as a point to jump to.

parameters.name: cueunit
parameters.label: Cue Unit
parameters.description: Select the units for this parameter from Index, Frames, and Seconds.

parameters.name: perspective
parameters.label: Perspective
parameters.description: Choose between Left or Right camera.

parameters.name: image
parameters.label: Image
parameters.description: Selects between the Color, Depth, Confidence, Disparity, Normals, Point Cloud, Spatial Texture, or Mask modes.

parameters.name: cameraresolution
parameters.label: Camera Resolution
parameters.description: Selects the resolution of the camera capture.

parameters.name: camerafps
parameters.label: Camera FPS
parameters.description: Sets the frame rate of the camera capture.

parameters.name: sensingmode
parameters.label: Sensing Mode
parameters.description: Selects betweem Standard and Fill mode.

parameters.name: depthquality
parameters.label: Depth Quality
parameters.description: Selects the depth computation mode of the camera.

parameters.name: mindepth
parameters.label: Minimum Depth
parameters.description: Sets the minimum depth in meters that will be computed.

parameters.name: maxdepth
parameters.label: Maximum Depth
parameters.description: Sets the maximum depth in meters.

parameters.name: toocloseval
parameters.label: Too Close Value
parameters.description: For depth pixels that are too close to resolve, this pixel value will be output instead.

parameters.name: toofarval
parameters.label: Too Far Value
parameters.description: For depth pixels that are too far to resolve, this pixel value will be output instead.

parameters.name: unknownval
parameters.label: Unknown Value
parameters.description: For depth pixels whose depth can not be determined, output this value instead.

parameters.name: depthstabilization
parameters.label: Depth Stabilization
parameters.description: Enables depth stabilization for the camera.

parameters.name: rerange
parameters.label: Rerange
parameters.description: Enabling this will remap pixel values to 0-1.

parameters.name: referenceframe
parameters.label: Reference Frame
parameters.description: Select between World and Camera reference frames for the Point Cloud pixels.

parameters.name: resetcameratransform
parameters.label: Camera Transform
parameters.description: Resets the camera position used for the reference frame above.

parameters.name: mirrorimage
parameters.label: Mirror Image
parameters.description: Flips the image in the y-axis.

parameters.name: disableselfcalib
parameters.label: Disable Self-Calibration
parameters.description: Disables self-calibration process at camera opening.

parameters.name: roimmask
parameters.label: Region of Interest Mask
parameters.description: Specify the operator that contains the Region of Interest Mask texture. If more than half of an objects bounding box is outside of the region of interest mask, it will discard the detection.

parameters.name: roimchannel
parameters.label: Region of Interest Channel
parameters.description: Determines which part of the texture used to calculate the final mask.

parameters.name: bright
parameters.label: Brightness
parameters.description: Turn on to enable brightness adjustment controls for the camera. When disabled, the camera will use default brightness.

parameters.name: brightval
parameters.label: Brightness
parameters.description: The brightness of the camera feed.

parameters.name: cont
parameters.label: Contrast
parameters.description: Turn on to enable contrast adjustment controls for the camera. When disabled, the camera will use default contrast.

parameters.name: contval
parameters.label: Contrast
parameters.description: The contrast of the camera feed.

parameters.name: hue
parameters.label: Hue
parameters.description: Turn on to enable hue adjustment controls for the camera. When disabled, the camera will use default hue.

parameters.name: hueval
parameters.label: Hue
parameters.description: The hue of the camera feed.

parameters.name: sat
parameters.label: Saturation
parameters.description: Turn on to enable saturation adjustment controls for the camera. When disabled, the camera will use default saturation.

parameters.name: satval
parameters.label: Saturation
parameters.description: The saturation of the camera feed.

parameters.name: sharp
parameters.label: Sharpness
parameters.description: Turn on to enable sharpness adjustment controls for the camera. When disabled, the camera will use default sharpness.

parameters.name: sharpval
parameters.label: Sharpness
parameters.description: The sharpness of the camera feed.

parameters.name: gamma
parameters.label: Gamma
parameters.description: Turn on to enable gamma adjustment controls for the camera. When disabled, the camera will use default gamma.

parameters.name: gammaval
parameters.label: Gamma
parameters.description: The gamma of the camera feed.

parameters.name: autogainexp
parameters.label: Auto Gain-Exposure
parameters.description: Turn on to enable auto gain and exposure for the camera. When disabled, the camera will not apply auto gain and exposure.

parameters.name: gain
parameters.label: Gain
parameters.description: Turn on to enable gain adjustment controls for the camera. When disabled, the camera will use default gain.

parameters.name: gainval
parameters.label: Gain
parameters.description: The gain of the camera feed.

parameters.name: exp
parameters.label: Exposure
parameters.description: Turn on to enable exposure adjustment controls for the camera. When disabled, the camera will use default exposure.

parameters.name: expval
parameters.label: Exposure
parameters.description: The exposure of the camera feed.

parameters.name: roi
parameters.label: Region of Interest
parameters.description: Turn on to enable region of interest adjustment controls for the camera when auto gain and exposure is enabled. When disabled, the region of interest will be the full image. The region of interest is

parameters.name: autowhitebal
parameters.label: Auto White Balance
parameters.description: Turn on to enable auto white balance for the camera. When disabled, the camera will not apply auto white balance.

parameters.name: whitebal
parameters.label: White Balance
parameters.description: Turn on to enable white balance controls for the camera. When disabled, the camera will use default white balance.

parameters.name: whitebalval
parameters.label: White Balance
parameters.description: The white balance of the camera feed. White balance values are internally multiplied by 100 to be within the range of [2800, 6500].

parameters.name: ledstat
parameters.label: LED Status
parameters.description: Turn on to enable the front LED of camera. When disabled, the camera LED will be disabled.

parameters.name: coordy
parameters.label: Coordy
parameters.description: The coordinate of the top-left corner of the region of interest rectangle.

parameters.name: reboot
parameters.label: Reboot
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: dimh
parameters.label: Dimh
parameters.description: The dimensions of the region of interest rectangle.
